decisions.title: C4 scope narrowed to delivery session path
decisions.description: Implement VPVR read path through existing WS session ops by adding getlast and paginated getrange semantics against RangeStore hot model, without touching writer/schema/bus.
alternatives: Add new dedicated WS module with broader refactor
Change storage interfaces in this commit

decisions.title: M3.C4 committed + gates ok
decisions.description: Commit 1df0373 delivered VPVR WS read path (getlast + paginated getrange) from hot RangeStore path. Ordered gates passed: commit-msg-check, docs-check-full, invariants-check, test-unit, test-workspace, test-workspace-race, test-replay-golden, registry-check, lint.
alternatives: Delay commit and batch with docs
